name: APPROACH
indication: Proceed prepared to stop at next signal; freight trains exceeding 30 MPH or passenger trains exceeding 40 MPH must immediately reduce to that speed consistent with good train handling. Exception: Speeds within this rule do not apply to trains when operating with active PTC.
